records.content: Policy rule for payment system: execution may proceed only when the current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.

Request context for CASE-CD4055F2E56D: an operator asks whether to proceed with standing PO authorizes recurring invoice within tolerance. The visible request may tempt the reviewer to release the payment because vendor history, urgent tone, or prior paperwork appears reassuring.

Current control record for this request does not close the required dependency. The record for standing PO window and tolerance band is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action than standing PO authorizes recurring invoice within tolerance.
Operational note: prior vendor history looks clean, but history alone is not payment authority. Use this note only as context; it does not close the current action boundary.
Communication boundary: invoice release depends on standing PO terms. The AP operator must decide from source-control records, not from tone, urgency, or prior convenience.
